title: platanthera hyperborea var. purpurascens
intro: Platanthera hyperborea var. purpurascens, also known as the purple-fruited green orchid, is a rare and unique variety of the green orchid plant, characterized by its distinctive purple-colored fruiting structures. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The purple-fruited green orchid has been reported to have various health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
